title: Sampling and Priority
description: Samplers, sampling rules, and priority management for trace sampling decisions. Note: dedicated 'src/Sampling/' directory does not exist as PHP files — sampling logic is split between a PHP constants/value class (PrioritySampling), Tracer interface methods, SpanContext propagation, TextMap header injection/extraction, and the C extension's native rule-matching engine.

classes.name: PrioritySampling
constants: AUTO_REJECT = 0   // Agent drops trace (automatic sampler decision)
AUTO_KEEP = 1     // Agent keeps trace (automatic sampler decision)
USER_KEEP = 2     // Agent keeps trace (user-instructed); backend applies volume cap only
UNKNOWN = null    // Could not be parsed
methods: public static parse($value): int|null  // parses raw header value to priority constant

classes.name: Tracer (interface)
classes.notes: Tracer interface owns the canonical sampling API alongside span lifecycle methods

classes.name: Tracer
sampling_methods: public setPrioritySampling($prioritySampling): void  // calls native set_priority_sampling($p) and set_priority_sampling($p, true) (user flag)
public getPrioritySampling(): int|null              // delegates to native get_priority_sampling()
private setPrioritySamplingFromSpan(SpanInterface $span): void  // reads propagated priority from root span context and calls set_priority_sampling()
call_sites: startRootSpan() calls setPrioritySamplingFromSpan() on new root span
TextMap::inject() calls getPrioritySampling() to write x-datadog-sampling-priority header

classes.name: NoopTracer
sampling_methods: public getPrioritySampling(): null  // always returns null

classes.name: SpanContext (interface)
sampling_methods: getPropagatedPrioritySampling(): int  // initial priority received from upstream

classes.name: SpanContext (abstract data)
sampling_fields: public $propagatedPrioritySampling: int  // priority inherited from distributed tracing parent

classes.name: SpanContext
key_methods: static createAsChild(SpanContextInterface $parentContext): self  // propagates $propagatedPrioritySampling via setPropagatedPrioritySampling()
classes.notes: createAsChild() calls $instance->setPropagatedPrioritySampling($parentContext->getPropagatedPrioritySampling()) — key priority propagation chain

classes.name: TextMap
sampling_methods: inject(SpanContextInterface, &$carrier): void  // writes x-datadog-sampling-priority if priority != UNKNOWN
private extractPrioritySampling(SpanContextInterface, $carrier): void  // reads x-datadog-sampling-priority, calls PrioritySampling::parse(), calls setPropagatedPrioritySampling()

classes.name: SamplingRuleMatchingBench
classes.notes: Benchmarks native sampling rule matching. Configures datadog.trace.sampling_rules INI as JSON array [{name, service, resource, sample_rate}]. Calls \DDTrace\get_priority_sampling() which triggers C-extension rule evaluation. Pattern formats: 'glob' (wildcards) or 'regex'. Fallback rule has no constraints, only sample_rate.

native_extension_elements.description: Sampler, RuleBasedSampler, RateLimiter, and SamplingRule are implemented in the C extension — not as PHP classes. They are exposed via INI config and native functions.
native_functions: \DDTrace\root_span(): SpanData  // used by benchmarks to set service/name/resource for rule matching
native_extension_elements.rate_limiter: Built into C extension; limits keep rate to configured max_per_second

relationships: DDTrace\Tracer depends_on DDTrace\Sampling\PrioritySampling (UNKNOWN constant in TextMap injection path)
DDTrace\Tracer delegates_to C_extension native set_priority_sampling / get_priority_sampling
priority_sampling_flow: 1. Incoming HTTP request → TextMap::extract() reads x-datadog-sampling-priority header
2. PrioritySampling::parse(rawValue) validates and maps to constant
4. Tracer::startRootSpan() → setPrioritySamplingFromSpan() → reads propagatedPrioritySampling from root context
5. Calls native set_priority_sampling(value) to set trace-level decision in C extension
6. C extension rule engine evaluates datadog.trace.sampling_rules against root span service/name/resource
7. On outgoing request → TextMap::inject() → tracer->getPrioritySampling() → native get_priority_sampling() → x-datadog-sampling-priority header
8. Agent receives trace with _sampling_priority_v1 tag and applies keep/drop decision
important_notes: The 'Sampler', 'SamplingRule', 'RuleBasedSampler', and 'RateLimiter' key elements named in the scope description do NOT exist as PHP classes — they are C extension constructs. The PHP layer provides only the PrioritySampling value class (constants + parse), Tracer get/set methods (delegating to native), and SpanContext propagation fields. Sampling rules are configured via INI JSON. Priority constants: USER_REJECT=-1, AUTO_REJECT=0, AUTO_KEEP=1, USER_KEEP=2.
